# Dependable Tires

> Tires and auto service in Orlando, FL. New tires, tire repair, alignments, and full auto service at fair prices.

## Contact
- Phone: (407) 739-3696
- Email: dependabletiresorlando@gmail.com
- Address: 11460 E Colonial Dr, Orlando, FL 32817
- Website: https://dependable-tires-production.up.railway.app/

## Hours
Mo-Fr 08:00-18:00, Sa 08:00-16:00

## Services
  - New Tires
  - Tire Repair
  - Alignments
  - Balancing
  - Oil Changes
  - Brake Service

## Service Area
- Primary: Orlando, FL
- Also serving: greater Orlando metropolitan area
